name: Ink Business Unlimited® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: $750 cash back (or 75,000 points if transferred) after spending $6,000 in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: 1.5% cash back (or 1.5x points) on all purchases, unlimited (no caps)

other_benefits.name: Employee Cards at No Cost
other_benefits.description: Add employee cards at no additional cost

other_benefits.name: Intro APR
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR for 12 months from account opening on purchases

other_benefits.name: Travel and Emergency Assistance
other_benefits.description: Access to travel and emergency services

other_benefits.name: Purchase Protection
other_benefits.description: Covers new purchases against damage or theft for 120 days

other_benefits.name: Extended Warranty
other_benefits.description: Extends U.S. manufacturer warranty by 1 year

notes: No annual fee flat-rate business card (1.5% on everything). Unlike Ink Business Cash, no bonus categories — just a simple flat rate. The 3% foreign transaction fee makes it less suitable for international use (use Sapphire Reserve instead for travel). Must pair with Ink Preferred to transfer points to partners. Good for businesses with irregular/unpredictable spending.
